MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Imposition of Sanctions issued on 6/9/2004 to Plaintiff's and Defendant's counsel in the amount of $250.00 each is scheduled this day. Joinder of Defendant's in Motion for Reconsideration of Sanctions is also scheduled this day.
There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Defendant's Joinder in Motion is also granted.
